[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101000 3
3 0001101 3
4 1010110 4
5 0011111 5
6 1111100 5
7 0001110 3

34 0011111 5 match 5

67 1011100 4
